name: Golden Saffron Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. Brush a 9-inch cake pan with butter.
2. Combine 2 tablespoons non-fat milk and saffron threads in a small saucepan. Heat and stir just to simmering, then remove from heat.
3. Sift together cake flour, 1 cup sugar, baking powder, and baking soda.
4. Stir together the saffron mixture, remaining non-fat milk, egg substitute, rose water, and 1 teaspoon vanilla into the dry ingredients until blended.
5. Pour batter into prepared pan and bake at 375°F for about 15 minutes or until a wooden pick inserted in the center comes out clean. Let cool for 5 minutes.
6. In a small saucepan, combine remaining 3/4 cup sugar and water. Heat to simmering and simmer for 5 minutes. Stir in the remaining 1/2 teaspoon vanilla.
7. With a skewer, poke holes evenly over the entire surface of the cake. Spoon syrup evenly over the top of the cake and sprinkle with pistachios.
8. Cut into diamond-shaped pieces, baklava-style. (If desired, use 1 large egg in place of 1/4 cup egg substitute.)
